/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-rpath,/home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/rwkv_lightning.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/rwkv_lightning.dir/src/rwkv_lightning.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rwkv_lightning.dir/src/API_servers/api_service.cpp.o -o rwkv_lightning   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -L/opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib:/opt/cuda/lib librwkv_backend_support.a /usr/lib/libdrogon.so.1.9.11 librwkv_infer_core.a /home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cuda.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /opt/cuda/lib/libnvrtc.so /home/alic-li/python_env/py312/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /opt/cuda/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/libtrantor.so.1.5.23 /usr/lib/libjsoncpp.so -lyaml-cpp -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
